data.biography: 黄志忠，中国内地男演员，毕业于中央戏剧学院，出生于天津，曾为天津体工大队青年队篮球运动员，因在电视剧《人间正道是沧桑》中扮演反面人物杨立仁而走红，在热播剧《中国远征军》、《新亮剑》中塑造了多个“荧幕硬汉”形象。
data.name: 黄志忠

data.biography: Huang Zhizhong is Chinese actor born in 5 March 1969 in Tianjin. Huang was a basketball player at a young age. After he retired from basketball team, he worked in Tianjin Textile manufacturing factory as a Machinist fitter. Later， he enter Tianjin Trade union Academy for a short training. In 1991, Huang attended the Central Academy of Drama, where he graduated in 1995. He has since gone on to star in numerous TV dramas and films, he is famous known by most audience since historical TV series The Road We Have Taken 2009
data.name: Huang Zhizhong

data.biography: 黃志忠，中國內地男演員，畢業於中央戲劇學院，出生於天津，曾為天津體工大隊青年隊籃球運動員，因在電視劇《人間正道是滄桑》中扮演反面人物楊立仁而走紅，在熱播劇《中國遠征軍》、《新亮劍》中塑造了多個“熒幕硬漢”形象。
data.name: 黃志忠
